---
title: "v5-pretrain-finetune-740 — analysis notebook"
format: html
---

Stub for post-run analysis.

- Pre-train per-group loss trajectories: `results/pretrain_history.json`
- Mid-pretrain probe trajectory: `results/mid_probe_history.json`
- Linear probe metrics: `metrics_linear_probe.json`
- Full fine-tune metrics: `metrics_finetune.json` (mirrored to `metrics.json`)
